name: Fast Auto Loans, Inc.
description_short: Fast Auto Loans, Inc. offers title loans ($300–$15,000) and registration loans (up to $2,500) with same-day funding across Arizona locations. No credit check required.
description_long:
Fast Auto Loans, Inc. is a title loan and registration loan lender with multiple locations across Arizona, including Glendale, Peoria, and Phoenix. The company specializes in short-term collateral-based lending for consumers seeking emergency cash. Founded to serve customers who need quick funds regardless of credit history, Fast Auto Loans positions itself as a direct lender with local store presence and online application options.

The company offers two primary loan products: title loans (up to $15,000) secured by a lien-free vehicle title, and registration loans (up to $2,500) based on current vehicle registration and proof of income. Both products advertise same-day or 30-minute approval and funding. Fast Auto Loans accepts all credit types and emphasizes that approval depends more on vehicle condition and required documentation than credit history. Applicants can apply online or in person at any of their four Arizona locations.

Fast Auto Loans distinguishes itself through multiple service channels (online and in-store), local lending with direct store involvement in approval decisions, bilingual support (English and Spanish), and a simplified application process requiring only basic documentation: valid ID, vehicle inspection, and lien-free title (for title loans) or proof of income (for registration loans). The company advertises fast callback from local representatives and transparent required-items lists on their website.

As a collateral-based emergency lender, Fast Auto Loans serves a high-risk segment of the consumer finance market. While same-day funding and no-credit-check approval are genuine advantages for customers in crisis, title and registration loans typically carry higher interest rates and fees than unsecured personal loans, and vehicle seizure is a real enforcement mechanism. The company does not publicly disclose APRs, fees, or repayment terms on the reviewed content, which limits transparency. Customers should carefully review loan agreements before proceeding.
pros: Same-day or 30-minute funding available for approved applicants
Loan amounts up to $15,000 for title loans and $2,500 for registration loans
Accepts all credit types; no credit check required for approval
Multiple service channels: online application plus four in-store Arizona locations
Bilingual support (English and Spanish) with local representative callbacks
Simple documentation requirements (ID, vehicle inspection, lien-free title or proof of income)
Flexible application process with convenient Glendale location near Downtown and major intersections
cons: APR, fees, and repayment terms not disclosed on website; lack of rate transparency
Title loans require vehicle as collateral with risk of repossession if loan defaults
Registration loans limited to $2,500 maximum, significantly less than title loan offerings
No information provided on loan duration, payment schedules, or early repayment penalties
Higher-cost lending product typical of title loan industry; not suitable for long-term financial planning
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history facing immediate cash emergencies
Vehicle owners needing $1,000–$5,000 quickly who cannot qualify for unsecured personal loans
Glendale, Peoria, and Phoenix area residents seeking local in-person lending with same-day funding
Spanish-speaking borrowers seeking bilingual financial services in Arizona
diagnosis: Fast Auto Loans, Inc. is best for Arizona residents with poor credit or no credit history who own a vehicle and need emergency cash within hours, not days. The critical caveat is that title and registration loans are high-cost debt products secured by your vehicle; defaulting risks repossession. Borrowers should only use this for true emergencies and must review all fees and APRs (not provided on the website) before committing.
services: Title loans up to $15,000 with same-day funding
Registration loans up to $2,500 based on vehicle registration
Online title loan application and approval
In-person loan processing at four Arizona store locations
Local representative callbacks for loan explanation and Q&A
Online payment processing (Make A Payment portal)
FAQ resources for title loans, registration loans, and online title loans
Consumer disclosure documentation and rates/fees information
No-credit-check approval for all credit types
Convenient Glendale location near Downtown Glendale and Catlin Court Historic District
